name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Clonar el repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Preparar Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
      - name: Instalar dependencias
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest httpx
      - name: Correr pruebas
        run: pytest test_app.py
